name: memory-backend-ucast-js
description: Memory backend PoC using @ucast/js. All 50 tests pass covering: comparison operators (MEM-01), logical operators (MEM-02), orderBy multi-field (MEM-03), skip/take pagination (MEM-04), reference ID filtering (MEM-05), same-reference returns (MEM-06), capabilities declaration (MEM-07). Custom $contains interpreter added. Nested path filtering works. 10k items filter+sort+paginate < 200ms.
relevantCode: MemoryBackend class: execute() uses @ucast/js for filtering, custom applyOrderBy() for sorting, slice() for pagination. Custom contains interpreter handles string.includes() and array.includes(). Parser extended with $contains instruction.
recommendation: ADOPT @ucast/js for memory backend. Pairs naturally with @ucast/mongo parser. Custom $contains interpreter demonstrates extensibility. orderBy/skip/take implemented separately (not part of @ucast).
